positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene. A stylized grouping of overlapping abstract trees and jungle leaves, rendered in clean silhouette style with negative space. The main color palette is deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and earthy beige, providing high contrast against a white background. The composition should be circular or framed, suitable for central apparel placement. Use clean lines, vector art quality, and a slightly pointillist texture for depth. Focus on symmetrical balance and bold, graphic shapes. High contrast, vibrant, sophisticated, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low resolution, noisy, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, complex background, extra limbs, distorted, bad anatomy
